response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates 13+ years of full-stack experience with a strong match to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Nest.js) and additional proficiency in Kotlin/Java and cloud technologies. His recent roles show direct relevance to scalability, automation, and AI-agent infrastructure, while his open-source contributions and leadership in dev-ops practices indicate architectural depth and process improvement capabilities.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with direct match to primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Nest.js)
Proven track record in scaling systems (handling millions of requests, Direct Mail automation platform)
Strong leadership in dev-ops, CI/CD, and testing frameworks (Vitest, Jest, Playwright)
concerns: Recent role at re:cinq is very short (since April 2025) and lacks detail on contributions
Limited formal education in core stack (degree includes photography/video/image processing)
No explicit mention of PostgreSQL or Kubernetes in recent roles, though GitLab CI/Docker context exists

key_factors.factor: Direct stack match and full-stack experience
Short tenure in most recent role
